message:
fix(core,ondisk): read indirect blocks through active scope and re-acquire block device after create_inode

Indirect block write paths (single, double, triple) were reading blocks via
RequestScope::empty() instead of the active transaction scope, which meant
freshly allocated zero-filled indirect blocks that hadn't been flushed to
disk were invisible to subsequent pointer writes in the same transaction.
Now all read_block_with_scope calls in write_block_ptr, ensure_pointer_in_block,
and allocate_new_indirect_block pass the live scope through.

Also fixes create_directory_inode to re-acquire the block device adapter after
create_inode() returns, ensuring subsequent metadata reads observe the newly
committed inode-table state rather than stale cached data.

Additionally applies rustfmt-style formatting fixes to btrfs import lists,
alloc_blocks_persist call sites, and write_block_ptr argument layout.

- crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs: scope-aware indirect reads, block_dev re-acquire,
  formatting across e2compr write paths and directory creation
- crates/ffs-ondisk/src/ext4.rs: formatting improvements
- crates/ffs-ondisk/src/lib.rs: formatting improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,11 +23,10 @@ pub use ext4::{
     Ext4CompatFeatures, Ext4DirEntry, Ext4DirEntryRef, Ext4DirEntryTail, Ext4DxEntry, Ext4DxRoot,
     Ext4Extent, Ext4ExtentHeader, Ext4ExtentIndex, Ext4FileType, Ext4GroupDesc, Ext4ImageReader,
     Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4Inode, Ext4RoCompatFeatures, Ext4Superblock, Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree,
-    FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, dx_hash, ext4_chksum,
-    iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block_casefold, parse_dir_block,
-    parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree, parse_ibody_xattrs, parse_inode_extent_tree,
-    parse_xattr_block, stamp_block_bitmap_checksum, stamp_dir_block_checksum,
-    stamp_extent_block_checksum, stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum,
+    FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, dx_hash, ext4_chksum, iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block,
+    lookup_in_dir_block_casefold, parse_dir_block, parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree,
+    parse_ibody_xattrs, parse_inode_extent_tree, parse_xattr_block, stamp_block_bitmap_checksum,
+    stamp_dir_block_checksum, stamp_extent_block_checksum, stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum,
     verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum, verify_group_desc_checksum,
     verify_inode_checksum,
 };
